programme.title: The L.A. Riots: 25 Years Later
programme.desc: (MA) A documentary marking the 25th anniversary of the infamous L.A. riots that reexamines the intense and life-changing events through the eyes of those who lived it.

programme.title: History'S Most Shocking
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History'S Most Shocking
programme.desc: (M) Tony Harris analyzes shocking moments on camera: from a pilot's ejector seat save, a motorist escaping falling trees, a stuck spelunker, to the Hindenburg explosion mystery.

programme.title: The Engineering That Built The World
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
